description: Implement gookvs, a TiKV-like distributed transactional KVS in Go. Test-driven: convert TiKV test cases to Go first, then implement. Scope: Tier-1 all + Tier-2 (minus TLS/mTLS) + Tier-4 Admin CLI.

userStories.title: Proto: generate Go code from kvproto
userStories.description: Reuse kvproto .proto files and generate Go code via protoc-gen-go / protoc-gen-go-grpc.
acceptanceCriteria: kvproto .proto files are present in proto/
Go code is generated and compiles successfully
Generated gRPC service stubs are importable

userStories.title: pkg/codec: memcomparable byte encoding
userStories.description: Implement memcomparable byte encoding, number encoding (uint64, int64, float64), and VarInt. Port TiKV codec tests.
acceptanceCriteria: TiKV codec tests ported to Go and passing
Number encoding/decoding is byte-identical to TiKV

userStories.title: pkg/keys: user key / internal key encoding
userStories.description: Implement user key to internal key conversion, local key builders for Raft/region state keys.
acceptanceCriteria: TiKV keys tests ported to Go and passing
Key encoding matches TiKV format exactly
Local key builders (region state, raft state) work correctly

userStories.title: pkg/cfnames: column family constants
userStories.description: Define column family name constants: CF_DEFAULT, CF_LOCK, CF_WRITE, CF_RAFT.

userStories.title: pkg/txntypes: Lock, Write, Mutation structs
userStories.description: Implement Lock, Write, Mutation structs with binary serialization byte-identical to TiKV.
acceptanceCriteria: TiKV txn_types tests ported to Go and passing
Binary format is byte-identical to TiKV

userStories.title: internal/engine/traits: KvEngine interfaces
userStories.description: Define Go interfaces for KvEngine, Snapshot, WriteBatch, and iterators.
acceptanceCriteria: Engine trait tests ported from TiKV

userStories.title: internal/engine/rocks: RocksDB backend
userStories.description: Implement RocksDB backend via grocksdb with 4 column families.
acceptanceCriteria: RocksDB engine tests ported and passing
CRUD operations work across 4 column families

userStories.title: pkg/pdclient: PD client
userStories.description: Implement PD client for bootstrap, heartbeats, and TSO.
acceptanceCriteria: PD client tests ported and passing

userStories.title: internal/raftstore: Raft consensus and region management
userStories.description: Implement raftstore with router (9a), core peer loop (9b), snapshot (9c), and region split (9d).
acceptanceCriteria: Core: single-region propose/apply via etcd/raft works
Snapshot: SST export and ingest works
Split: region split on size threshold works

userStories.title: internal/storage/mvcc: MVCC reader/writer
userStories.description: Implement MvccTxn (write accumulator), MvccReader, PointGetter, Scanner.

userStories.title: internal/storage/txn: scheduler, latch, concurrency, actions
userStories.description: Implement latch system (11a), ConcurrencyManager (11b), TxnScheduler and Percolator actions (11c).
acceptanceCriteria: Latch tests ported and passing (deadlock-free serialization)

userStories.title: internal/server: gRPC server and KV service
userStories.description: Implement gRPC server with KV service RPCs, routing, and BatchCommands.
acceptanceCriteria: KvGet, KvPrewrite, KvCommit RPCs work end-to-end
M5 milestone: TiKV-compatible client can execute KV operations

userStories.title: internal/config: configuration system
userStories.description: Implement config struct hierarchy, TOML loading via BurntSushi/toml, and validation pipeline.

userStories.title: internal/log: logging and diagnostics
userStories.description: Implement log/slog + zap backend + LogDispatcher + slow log + file rotation via lumberjack.
acceptanceCriteria: Structured logging works with slog interface
userStories.testSource: Adapt TiKV log format tests; test LogDispatcher routing

userStories.title: internal/server/transport: inter-node Raft transport
userStories.description: Implement RaftClient for inter-node Raft message transport and snapshot transfer.
acceptanceCriteria: Raft messages sent between nodes correctly
Snapshot transfer via chunked gRPC works

userStories.title: internal/server/status: HTTP status and diagnostics server
userStories.description: Implement HTTP status server with pprof, metrics, and config endpoints.

userStories.title: Flow control and backpressure
userStories.description: Implement read pool EWMA, write flow controller, and scheduler memory quota.
acceptanceCriteria: Read pool backpressure triggers at threshold
Write flow controller limits write rate

userStories.title: internal/coprocessor: query push-down framework
userStories.description: Implement DAG executor pipeline, RPN expressions, and aggregations.

userStories.title: Async commit and 1PC optimizations
userStories.description: Implement async commit and 1PC transaction optimizations.
acceptanceCriteria: Async commit reduces latency for qualifying transactions
1PC avoids CF_LOCK writes for single-region small transactions
Async commit tests ported and passing

userStories.title: Pessimistic transactions
userStories.description: Implement pessimistic lock acquire, upgrade, and rollback.
acceptanceCriteria: Lock upgrade from pessimistic to optimistic works
Pessimistic transaction tests ported and passing

userStories.title: cmd/gookvs-ctl: Admin CLI
userStories.description: Implement admin CLI for inspecting regions, dumping SST, and triggering manual operations.
acceptanceCriteria: CLI help and usage work correctly
